name: Yantrik Memory
description: Persistent cognitive memory for AI agents — powered by YantrikDB's 5-index architecture with personality traits, bond evolution, and context assembly
author: Yantrikos

agent_id.description: Unique identifier for this agent's memories

encryption_enabled.description: Enable Fernet encryption for sensitive memories

memory.remember: Store memories via YantrikDB — 5-index architecture (Vector, Graph, Temporal, Decay, KV)
memory.recall: Hybrid retrieval with semantic similarity, graph connections, temporal decay, and keyword matching
memory.think: Cognitive maintenance — consolidation, conflict detection, pattern mining

personality.traits: 9 evolving personality traits with bidirectional signals and exponential decay
personality.bonds: 6-stage relationship evolution from stranger to bonded
personality.soul: Per-user trait customization with base/user blending

context.get_full_context: Assemble complete LLM context from memories, traits, bonds, and conversation state
context.process_turn: Single entry point — extract memories, evolve traits, update bond, return context

graph.relate: Build knowledge graph relationships between entities
graph.query: Traverse entity connections for context-aware retrieval

hooks.description: Load agent memory and refresh context on startup

codeExecution.what: Runs Python to manage YantrikDB memory database and assemble agent context
codeExecution.when: On gateway:startup, command:new, and when agent calls memory APIs
codeExecution.scope: Local filesystem only — reads/writes database and encryption key files
